behaviors.description: The evaluate-stage command stores grounding into a dedicated `grounding` artifact, not the `plan` artifact.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is stage-to-artifact-store wiring (module handoff), not pure local logic. MOCK-MISS: bug appears when evaluate writer and artifact slot mapping interact. REAL-INFRA: behavior text is about artifact slot selection, not OS/network/subprocess. LLM-DEP: no requirement about model output quality. MULTI-STEP: single stage write. Rejected adjacent Unit: disqualified by "stores grounding into a dedicated `grounding` artifact, not the `plan` artifact" (cross-module persistence contract). Rejected adjacent System: disqualified by same text; no real HTTP/OS/subprocess is part of the behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Run evaluate stage against the real in-process artifact repository used by the chain; assert `grounding` is created/updated and `plan` is untouched by this stage.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: A unit test of mapping logic could pass while integration wiring still writes the wrong slot; no System infra is needed.

behaviors.description: The implement-stage flow reads grounding when available and still writes its execution output to `plan`.
behaviors.justification: This is read/write orchestration across implement flow + artifact store. MOCK-MISS: stubbing either side can hide wrong slot usage or overwrite behavior. REAL-INFRA: no OS/network/subprocess requirement in behavior text. LLM-DEP: requirement is artifact routing, not model quality. MULTI-STEP: single stage behavior with one upstream input. Rejected adjacent Unit: disqualified by "reads grounding when available and still writes ... to `plan`" (two-module state handoff). Rejected adjacent System: disqualified because behavior does not require real external infra.
behaviors.test_description: Seed run context with a `grounding` artifact, execute implement flow, verify it consumed grounding and emitted execution output into `plan` without mutating `grounding`.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Needs module wiring; lower level risks missing contract mismatches; higher infra not required.

behaviors.description: Deep-dive no longer overwrites `plan` as a redundant side effect when diagnosis already exists in issue content.
behaviors.justification: The failure is conditional side-effect suppression at deep-dive + artifact persistence boundary. MOCK-MISS: pure function tests can miss accidental repository writes. REAL-INFRA: no real OS/network/subprocess implied. LLM-DEP: check is about side effects, not output quality. MULTI-STEP: single stage condition. Rejected adjacent Unit: disqualified by "no longer overwrites `plan`" (observable persistence side effect). Rejected adjacent System: disqualified by behavior text focusing on artifact side effect, not external infra.
behaviors.test_description: Provide issue content with existing diagnosis, run deep-dive stage wired to artifact store, assert no `plan` overwrite/write occurs.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Integration is minimal to catch unintended writes; System would be unnecessary.

behaviors.description: Artifact lineage is preserved so implement can read the `grounding` artifact produced earlier in the same run context.
behaviors.justification: This is run-context lineage and retrieval across modules/stages; primary risk is state handoff correctness. REAL-INFRA: behavior is in-process context lineage, not OS/network/subprocess. LLM-DEP: correctness does not depend on model judgment content. MULTI-STEP: staged handoff exists, but can be validated deterministically without real agentic calls. Rejected adjacent Unit: disqualified by "produced earlier in the same run context" (cross-component lineage). Rejected adjacent System: disqualified since no real external infra is specified.
behaviors.test_description: Within one run context, write `grounding` from an earlier-stage component, then invoke implement retrieval path and assert lineage lookup resolves the same artifact instance/version.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Requires multi-module context wiring but not OS/network/LLM non-determinism.

behaviors.description: In a full multi-step agent run (`deep-dive -> write-plan/evaluate -> implement`), the final implementation plan reflects grounding produced earlier in the run.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires end-to-end multi-step agent sequence and final outcome dependence on earlier grounding. MULTI-STEP: yes (three stages). LLM-DEP: stages are agent steps where model decisions can affect what grounding is produced/used; stubs risk deterministic-assertion trap. REAL-INFRA is not the main boundary, but real agent pipeline behavior is. Rejected adjacent Agentic: disqualified by "full multi-step agent run (`deep-dive -> write-plan/evaluate -> implement`)" (more than one agentic decision/handoff).
behaviors.test_description: Execute the real chained run with deep-dive, evaluate/write-plan, and implement in one context; assert final `plan` content includes/reflects grounding generated earlier and passed through the chain.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Lower levels can validate single-step contracts but not full pipeline handoff effects across sequential agentic stages.

behaviors.description: When grounding is absent, implement falls back safely and still emits a valid plan artifact without corrupting other stored artifacts.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is fallback path + artifact store integrity across modules. MOCK-MISS: pure unit fallback logic may pass while integration still corrupts artifacts. REAL-INFRA: no OS/network/subprocess needed per behavior text. LLM-DEP: correctness is fallback/storage safety, not model quality. MULTI-STEP: single implement-stage fallback condition. Rejected adjacent Unit: disqualified by "emits a valid plan artifact without corrupting other stored artifacts" (repository state interaction). Rejected adjacent System: disqualified because no external infra behavior is specified.
behaviors.test_description: Run implement with no `grounding` in context and pre-existing unrelated artifacts; verify a valid `plan` is emitted and unrelated artifacts remain unchanged.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Integration is needed for storage corruption detection; System adds no additional failure surface for this behavior.
